# Bright Ears

> Bright Ears is the AI booking agent for independent performers of every kind — DJs, bands, singers, musicians, magicians, dancers, MCs, comedians and more. It proactively HUNTS for venues that book entertainment in the artist's cities, drafts the outreach in the artist's own voice for one-tap approval, and answers every incoming inquiry with availability-aware replies designed to go out within minutes of approval. Everything is white-label: clients and venues only ever see the artist, never the AI. Self-serve, subscribe to activate, month-to-month, cancel anytime.

## What it does

- The Hunt: scans the artist's home cities (and Travel Mode destinations) for venues that book entertainment — new openings and established rooms — scores each for fit with the reasons spelled out, and drafts a personalized pitch in the artist's voice. The artist approves; sending goes through the artist's own Gmail.
- Catches every incoming lead source via simple email forwarding — plain email, website forms, and The Knot / WeddingWire / Bark / GigSalad notification emails. No password sharing for the inbox; nothing to install.
- Filters spam and scam inquiries before the owner ever sees them.
- Drafts a personalized, availability-aware reply from the owner's own rate card and voice samples — designed so a reply can go out within minutes of the owner's tap, even after hours.
- Owner approves or edits from their phone in one or two taps.
- Follow-up sequences (day 2/5/9) run until each lead is booked or gone quiet, with hard stops on reply, booking, or opt-out, and compliant one-tap unsubscribe.
- Travel Mode: point the hunt at a city for specific dates and it drafts date-bounded outreach for that trip.
- Weekly report shows what the agent did: venues found, inquiries answered, gigs booked.

## Pricing

- No free trial — you subscribe to activate. Month-to-month, cancel anytime; at your plan's cap we pause rather than surprise-bill.
- Every tier is the complete engine: the Hunt that finds venues, answers to every inquiry, follow-ups, weekly report, Travel Mode, and the same deep research quality on every plan. Tiers gate only the dials below.
- Starter: $25/month — answers up to 15 of your incoming inquiries/month, hunts your 1 home city, you approve every send.
- Pro: $79/month — up to 60 inquiries/month, hunts up to 3 cities, auto-sends from the sources you trust.
- Studio: $149/month — up to 150 inquiries/month, hunts all your cities, auto-send at full stretch.
- The inquiry numbers are ceilings on your own incoming inquiries, not a promise to deliver leads. The Hunt finds and pitches opportunities; it never guarantees bookings — results depend on demand where you play. At the cap, drafting pauses — there are never surprise bills.

## The story (verifiable)

We ran entertainment for venues for 20 years and drowned in the same inquiries, schedules, and invoices as every performer. So we built an AI back office for our own agency — her name is Vinyl, and she still runs it today at our live agency. Bright Ears is that same idea, rebuilt and pointed outward: an agent that hunts for the artist.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://brightears.io/): what Bright Ears does, with a live demo of the reply engine
- [Pricing](https://brightears.io/pricing): plans and inquiry metering explained
- [Compare](https://brightears.io/compare): Bright Ears vs DJ Event Planner, HoneyBook, and other performer software
- [Roadmap](https://brightears.io/roadmap): what's live, what's building, what's next — in writing
- [Our story](https://brightears.io/story): 20 years of gigs, and the AI that runs our own agency
- [Get started](https://brightears.io/onboarding): self-serve signup, then choose a plan to activate

## Free tools

- [Inquiry Reply Generator](https://brightears.io/tools/inquiry-reply-generator): paste a real inquiry, watch a reply draft itself
- [25 Inquiry & Follow-Up Templates](https://brightears.io/tools/templates): copy-paste first replies, day 2/5/9 follow-ups, review asks, rebooking and referral emails
- [Lead ROI Calculator](https://brightears.io/tools/lead-roi-calculator): what slow replies cost per year at your booking rate, with the math shown

## Who it's for

Independent performers and small performer businesses (1–5 people) of every kind — DJs, bands, singers, musicians, magicians, dancers, MCs, comedians, photo booths. Marketing speaks to DJs first; the engine treats every craft the same. Not for venues or large agencies.
